title: bidens scopulorum
intro: Bidens scopulorum, also known as Scouler's bidens or mountain beggarticks, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the aster family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Bidens scopulorum is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
